task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the OpenCAD dispatch dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenCAD web interface, specifically the dispatch or active calls dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify the call is created with the correct caller and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a call creation form or active call details showing 'Foreman Mike' in the Caller field and 'Quarry Main Gate' in the Location field.

task_completion.description: Verify the initial description of the trespassing incident is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Individual climbing over the perimeter fence.' (or containing the keywords 'climbing' and 'fence') in the call description or initial notes field.

task_completion.description: Verify the call narrative is updated with the security unit's status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an added note, narrative update, or comment on the call containing 'Security unit 1A-01 is on scene. Subject is compliant.' (or containing the keywords '1A-01' and 'compliant').

task_completion.description: Verify the call is resolved and marked as closed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the call status indicator showing 'Closed' or 'Resolved' in the call details or the recent calls list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenCAD web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show a web browser navigating the OpenCAD interface, not a text editor, terminal, or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel should not be open and modifying the DOM text.

integrity.description: Verify the call was actually saved/submitted to the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The call should appear in a list of active/recent calls or show a saved state, rather than just being typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating and resolving a call in OpenCAD. Caller must be 'Foreman Mike'. Location must be 'Quarry Main Gate'. Initial description must contain 'climbing' and 'fence'. The narrative update must contain '1A-01' and 'compliant'. The final call status must be 'Closed'.
